list.name: symbol
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT symbol FROM equity_market.trades ORDER BY symbol

targets.rawSql: SELECT minute_bucket AS time, symbol, vwap FROM equity_market.int_vwap WHERE $__timeFilter(minute_bucket) AND symbol IN ($symbol) ORDER BY minute_bucket
SELECT symbol, sum(total_volume) AS volume FROM equity_market.int_vwap WHERE $__timeFilter(minute_bucket) AND symbol IN ($symbol) GROUP BY symbol ORDER BY volume DESC

panels.title: Spread Heatmap (avg bps by symbol × hour)

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfHour(minute_bucket) AS time, symbol, avg(avg_spread_bps) AS spread FROM equity_market.int_spread_analytics WHERE $__timeFilter(minute_bucket) AND symbol IN ($symbol) GROUP BY time, symbol ORDER BY time

SELECT toTime(bucket_start) AS time_of_day, sum(bucket_volume) AS volume FROM equity_market.int_volume_profile WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket_start) AND symbol IN ($symbol) GROUP BY time_of_day ORDER BY time_of_day

SELECT symbol, trade_date, open_price, high_price, low_price, close_price, total_volume, day_vwap, avg_spread_bps, total_quality_issues, round(daily_return_pct, 3) AS return_pct FROM equity_market.mart_daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(trade_date) AND symbol IN ($symbol) ORDER BY trade_date DESC, symbol
